metadata.short_desc: Multi-model auto-fallback chain with per-model timeout for AstrBot image captioning
metadata.desc: Runs a local HTTP proxy between AstrBot and vision models. Supports configurable multi-level fallback chains with independent timeouts per model. Solves the issue that default_image_caption_provider_id only accepts a single model.

primary_api_base.hint: OpenAI-compatible API endpoint for the primary vision model, e.g. http://localhost:1234/v1

primary_api_key.hint: API key for the primary model. LM Studio defaults to lm-studio

primary_timeout.hint: Connection timeout for the primary model. Use 3-5s for local models (fast failover); use 10-15s for cloud APIs to tolerate network latency

fallback_chain.hint: JSON array of fallback models tried in order after the primary fails. Each entry requires api_base, api_key, model, and timeout (seconds). Supports any number of fallback models. Suggested timeout: 60-120s for cloud APIs

proxy_port.hint: Port the local proxy listens on. Add a corresponding provider_source in AstrBot pointing to this port

proxy_host.hint: Use 127.0.0.1 for local-only. Use 0.0.0.0 for Docker/cross-container scenarios
